headline: **MLB Daily Recap: May 13, 2026**
article:
The Cleveland Guardians secured a thrilling 3-2 victory over the Los Angeles Angels, with Hunter Gaddis earning the win. In other action, the New York Yankees took down the Baltimore Orioles 6-2, while the Washington Nationals dominated the Cincinnati Reds 10-4. The Colorado Rockies suffered a 1-3 loss to the Pittsburgh Pirates, with Paul Skenes leading the Pirates' pitching effort.

Several key players are dealing with injuries, including Athletics shortstop Jacob Wilson, who has been placed on the 10-day injured list due to a left shoulder dislocation. The New York Yankees have also placed shortstop José Caballero on the 10-day injured list with a right middle finger fracture. Other teams have also suffered injuries, including the Atlanta Braves, Toronto Blue Jays, and Detroit Tigers.

The Arizona Diamondbacks made a significant move, acquiring outfielder Jose Requena from the Los Angeles Dodgers in exchange for center fielder Alek Thomas. The San Francisco Giants traded catcher Patrick Bailey to the Cleveland Guardians for left-hander Matt Wilkinson and other considerations. The Baltimore Orioles acquired right-handers Enyel Garcia and Maicol Lauriano from the Philadelphia Phillies in exchange for cash.

top_news.title: **Guardians Edge Angels in Thrilling Finish**
top_news.summary: The Cleveland Guardians secured a 3-2 victory over the Los Angeles Angels, with Hunter Gaddis earning the win. Angel Martínez led the Angels' offense with 2 hits, including a home run, while Slade Cecconi pitched 4 strong innings for the Angels.

top_news.title: **Yankees Take Down Orioles 6-2**
top_news.summary: The New York Yankees secured a 6-2 victory over the Baltimore Orioles, with Will Warren earning the win after pitching 5.2 innings with 6 strikeouts and 2 earned runs. Trent Grisham led the Yankees' offense with a home run, 3 RBIs, and 1 hit in 3 at-bats.

top_news.title: **Nationals Take Down Reds 10-4**
top_news.summary: The Washington Nationals secured a decisive victory over the Cincinnati Reds, winning 10-4. Daylen Lile led the Nationals' offense with a standout performance, hitting 3 home runs and driving in 4 runs.

top_news.title: **Rockies Fall to Pirates in 1-3 Showdown**
top_news.summary: The Colorado Rockies suffered a 1-3 loss to the Pittsburgh Pirates, with Paul Skenes leading the Pirates' pitching effort. Skenes threw 8.0 innings, striking out 10 batters and allowing 0 earned runs.

top_news.title: **Athletics Place Jacob Wilson on 10-Day Injured List**
top_news.summary: Athletics shortstop Jacob Wilson has been placed on the 10-day injured list due to a left shoulder dislocation, effective retroactive to May 11, 2026. The injury occurred on May 11, 2026.

top_news.title: **Diamondbacks Acquire OF Jose Requena in Trade**
top_news.summary: The Arizona Diamondbacks have made a move to bolster their roster, acquiring outfielder Jose Requena from the Los Angeles Dodgers. The trade sent center fielder Alek Thomas to the Dodgers in exchange for Requena.
